name: guardrails
description: Safety guardrails for running Claude Code with reduced supervision. Ships the guard-destructive PreToolUse hook: hard-blocks catastrophic Bash commands (rm -rf /, rsync --delete, docker volume rm) and prompts for confirmation on other destructive operations (rm, rmdir, git reset --hard, shred, dd, mkfs). Exempts rm whose operands all sit under a temp directory.
